get.description: Returns artist link requests currently pending admin review.
Returns all artist link requests, including approved and rejected.

post.description: Approves an artist link request and links the target user to the requested artist profile.
Rejects an artist link request.
Confirms and executes deletion of an album previously flagged for delete review.
Dismisses an album delete request and clears its delete-requested flag.
Confirms and executes deletion of a song previously flagged for delete review.
Dismisses a song delete request and clears its delete-requested flag.

get.description: Returns up to 200 users for admin management, with optional username/email search.
Returns detailed admin view of a single user, including playlist and rating counts.

delete.description: Deletes a user account and related user-owned data. Admin cannot delete their own account.

post.description: Enables or disables a user account. Admin cannot disable their own account.

get.description: Returns up to 200 playlists for moderation, with optional text search.
Returns full details of a single playlist, including owner and songs.

put.description: Updates playlist metadata from the admin panel.

delete.description: Deletes a playlist from the system.

get.description: Returns up to 300 ratings for moderation, with optional search by user, email, song, or comment.
Returns full details of a single rating.
Returns city location records, optionally filtered by city or country.

post.description: Creates a city location record with geographic coordinates.

get.description: Returns a single city location record by identifier.

put.description: Updates an existing city location record.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of albums. Supports optional text search across title.

post.description: Admins create albums as Approved. Artists create albums as Pending — they require admin approval before becoming visible.

get.description: Returns a single album. Artists can only see their own pending albums; admins see all.

put.description: Updates title, release year, artist, and cover image of an existing album.

delete.description: Permanently deletes an album and its associated songs. Use confirm-delete under /api/admin for artist-requested deletions.

get.description: Returns aggregated rating statistics (average score, count, user's own rating) for the given album.
Returns all albums belonging to the given artist.
Returns albums submitted by artists that are awaiting admin approval.
Returns albums for which an artist has requested deletion. Admin must confirm or dismiss each request.

post.description: Marks a pending album as Approved, making it publicly visible.
Rejects a pending album submission. The album is removed from the pending queue.
Flags an album for deletion. Admins can then confirm or dismiss the request via /api/admin/albums/{id}/confirm-delete or dismiss-delete.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of artists, with optional text search by name.

post.description: Creates a new artist. If city and country are provided, coordinates are resolved automatically.

get.description: Returns only active artists.
Returns a single artist with its related albums.

put.description: Updates artist profile data, including location and optional coordinates.

delete.description: Deletes an artist if it has no dependent albums.

get.description: Returns aggregated rating statistics for the specified artist.

post.description: Approves an artist entry, marking it as active/approved in the catalog.
Authenticates user credentials and returns a JWT token when login succeeds.
Registers a new account and sends an email verification code (OTP).
Verifies a user's email using the OTP code previously sent by email.
Starts password reset flow by generating and emailing a reset OTP if the account exists.
Resets the user's password using a valid, non-expired OTP reset code.

get.description: Returns comments and replies for a song, including vote and visibility context for the current user.

post.description: Creates a top-level comment for a song, optionally linked to an existing rating.
Creates a reply under an existing parent comment for the same song.

put.description: Updates the text content of an existing comment or reply.

delete.description: Deletes a comment. Parent comments are removed together with their replies.

post.description: Creates or updates the current user's vote for a specific comment.

get.description: Returns all music genres.

post.description: Creates a new genre. Admin role required.

get.description: Returns a single genre by identifier.

put.description: Updates an existing genre name. Admin role required.

delete.description: Deletes a genre by identifier. Admin role required.

get.description: Runs all registered health checks and returns overall service health.
Runs readiness checks only (currently the database check tagged as ready).
Checks database connectivity and helps wake up auto-paused Azure SQL instances.
Returns playlists created by the specified user.
Returns a playlist with its current metadata and contents.

put.description: Updates playlist name, description, and cover image metadata.

get.description: Returns aggregated rating statistics for a playlist.
Returns playlists from other users to help discovery.

post.description: Creates a new playlist for the authenticated user.
Adds a song to the playlist if it is not already present.
Adds all songs from an album into the playlist and returns how many were added.

delete.description: Removes a single song from a playlist.

put.description: Reorders playlist songs using the provided song ID sequence.

delete.description: Removes the playlist cover image. Allowed for owner or admin.

get.description: Returns recommended songs not currently included in the playlist.
Returns top-rated songs, albums, artists, and playlists.
Returns rating summary for a song, including the current user's own rating when available.
Returns rating summary for an album, including the current user's own rating when available.
Returns rating summary for an artist, including the current user's own rating when available.
Returns rating summary for a playlist, including the current user's own rating when available.
Returns ratings created by a specific user, optionally limited to a maximum number of results.

post.description: Creates or updates the authenticated user's rating and optional comment for a song.

delete.description: Deletes the authenticated user's rating for a song.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of songs with optional text search.

post.description: Creates a new song. Admin submissions are approved immediately; artist submissions are pending.

get.description: Returns a single song. Artists can only see their own pending songs; admins see all.

put.description: Updates song title, duration, album, and genre.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a song. Admin role required.

get.description: Returns aggregated rating statistics for the specified song.
Returns all songs that belong to the specified album.
Returns all songs that belong to the specified artist.
Returns song submissions pending admin approval.
Returns songs flagged for deletion review by admin.

post.description: Approves a pending song submission.
Rejects a pending song submission.
Flags a song for deletion review.

get.description: Returns a user profile with safe, non-sensitive fields.

put.description: Updates a user profile. Allowed for the same user or admins.

get.description: Returns ratings submitted by the specified user.
